productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men F50 Cl Tee Black T-Shirts
description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester Climalite fabric, has a round ribbed neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, iconic three stipes print on the back in black, placement print on the upper left shoulder that flows to the upper left back and brand name printed on the upper right shoulderFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool while working out in this black T-shirt from adidas. The iconic three stripes on the back increases the brand appeal and the placement print gives an edgy vibe, while the Climalite fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long by drawing seat away from the skin. Team it with tracks and performance shoes and train better and longer. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
